subject: Re:
body:
you can see the papers are starting on hillary "friends" Vin gupta  . I think you are better off , not having your name associated.. If she gets the nomination, or even in the run-up, the others are likely to attack  her "friends
in any way they can.. 

----- Original Message ----
From: Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com>
To: J J <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, May 7, 2007 4:50:58 PM
Subject: 


Happy you are coming home - see you tom
Kisses

G
